title: Russia just passed a law allowing its central bank to down drones
summary_full: Russia's State Duma has passed a law allowing certain financial institutions to operate anti-drone defense systems after attacks on its territory.
summary_public: Russia's State Duma has passed a law allowing certain financial institutions to operate anti-drone defense systems after attacks on its territory.

RU.label: neutral
RU.evidence: Russia just passed a law allowing its central bank to down drones
